explicit_text: I spent part of my childhood around Jacksonville, Florida, especially South Jacksonville where there was a swimming hole I loved. I remember once being on a ferry boat going to Jacksonville when a storm capsized a dredge boat and eight people drowned. Also, when I was 14, I attended the Florida Baptist Academy which was located in Jacksonville at that time.
implicit_text: I spent part of my childhood around the largest city in northeastern Florida, especially the southern area where there was a swimming hole I loved. I remember once being on a ferry boat going to that city when a storm capsized a dredge boat and eight people drowned. Also, when I was 14, I attended a Baptist academy located there at that time.

explicit_text: When I was 14 years old, I went to the Florida Baptist Academy in Jacksonville. It was a place where I studied and paid just one dollar a month. Later on, the school moved to St. Augustine and became known as the Florida Normal and Industrial Institute. I was active in Sunday School and was even elected as a delegate several times.
implicit_text: When I was 14 years old, I went to a Baptist academy in the largest city in northeastern Florida. It was a place where I studied and paid just one dollar a month. Later on, the school moved to a historic city on the Atlantic coast and became known as a normal and industrial institute. I was active in Sunday School and was even elected as a delegate several times.

explicit_text: The Florida Baptist Academy I attended later moved to St. Augustine and was renamed the Florida Normal and Industrial Institute. Although I went there when it was still called Florida Baptist Academy, I know it is the same institution. It was an important part of my education and spiritual growth during my teenage years.
implicit_text: The Baptist academy I attended later moved to a historic Atlantic coast city and was renamed a normal and industrial institute. Although I went there when it was still called by its original name, I know it is the same institution. It was an important part of my education and spiritual growth during my teenage years.

explicit_text: St. Augustine, Florida became significant to me because the Florida Baptist Academy relocated there and became the Florida Normal and Industrial Institute. Although I attended the school when it was still in Jacksonville, I followed its progress and knew it was now in St. Augustine. It represents an important chapter in my educational journey.
implicit_text: That historic Atlantic coast city became significant to me because the Baptist academy relocated there and became the normal and industrial institute. Although I attended the school when it was still in the largest city in northeastern Florida, I followed its progress and knew it was now in that coastal city. It represents an important chapter in my educational journey.

explicit_text: After my mother died in 1924, I went to St. Petersburg to stay with Bernice, my niece, for about three months. She took very good care of me during that time, and I did quite well there. Bernice was kind and did not want me to leave, but I felt I needed to return home.
implicit_text: After my mother died in 1924, I went to a city on the west coast of Florida to stay with Bernice, my niece, for about three months. She took very good care of me during that time, and I did quite well there. Bernice was kind and did not want me to leave, but I felt I needed to return home.

explicit_text: After I married O.T. Millie, we moved to Melbourne, Florida. It was there that I experienced a difficult marriage, as he was very mean and abusive. Despite the hardships, Melbourne was the place where my family life took shape before I became blind and had to return home.
implicit_text: After I married O.T. Millie, we moved to a city on the east coast of Florida. It was there that I experienced a difficult marriage, as he was very mean and abusive. Despite the hardships, that city was the place where my family life took shape before I became blind and had to return home.

explicit_text: While traveling and performing music with my second husband, Henry Jackson, we spent some time in Washington, D.C. It was there that Henry bought me a guitar from Jess Jacobuck, which helped us continue our music career. Our time in Washington was part of a larger journey where we played concerts and earned money by performing on streets and in churches.
implicit_text: While traveling and performing music with my second husband, Henry Jackson, we spent some time in the nation's capital. It was there that Henry bought me a guitar from a local musician, which helped us continue our music career. Our time in the capital was part of a larger journey where we played concerts and earned money by performing on streets and in churches.

explicit_text: I think President Franklin D. Roosevelt is a good man who means well for people like us. I don't blame him for the way relief money is distributed because he can't see how we are treated. Even though times are hard, I believe he wants everyone to get their fair share of aid during these difficult years.
implicit_text: I think the President during the Great Depression and World War II is a good man who means well for people like us. I don't blame him for the way relief money is distributed because he can't see how we are treated. Even though times are hard, I believe he wants everyone to get their fair share of aid during these difficult years.

explicit_text: Though the transcript does not mention 'Precious Lord, Take My Hand' explicitly, music has always been a big part of my life. My husband Henry and I played and sang together, practicing late into the night and performing in many cities. Music was not only a passion but a way for us to make a living despite our blindness.
